metadata.title: Merchant Advice Transaction Details (Tax Invoice)
narrativeText: PO Box:106, Road:120, Block:316, Manama, Bahrain TRN: 200000410700002
Shop:74 Road:2802 Block:428 MANAMA KINGDOM OF BAHRAIN
# Standard VAT Rate(10.000 %) applied on all commission: All Currency charged are in BHD.
This is a transaction advice. check your vouchers against the details above. Please call 1721 4433 in case of a statement to the contrary within 7 days from the date of the advice" Kindly any

notes: Merchant-advice layout detected: extracted page into transaction and summary table blocks.
